site.title: Paweł Wasilewski — Software Engineer · visionOS · AI · Apple Platforms
site.description: Paweł Wasilewski — Software Engineer, visionOS developer, mentor, dev trainer and speaker. Building Spatial Computing and AI on Apple platforms.

hero.headline: Spatial Computing · AI · visionOS · Swift · .NET · JavaScript
hero.subtitle: — I'm Paweł Wasilewski, a Software Engineer, Mentor and Speaker.

about.title: About Me
professional: I build software for the next generation of computing — where Spatial Computing, AI, Apple platforms, and real-world problems meet.

My work spans enterprise systems, healthcare XR, developer education, and Apple Vision Pro applications. I started with .NET, JavaScript, and business software, then gradually moved toward immersive products and spatial experiences.
I also teach and mentor developers — helping people understand technology deeply, build confidence, and grow into stronger software professionals.
about.headline: A constant drive to learn, connect ideas, and build what does not exist yet.
now: Today, I focus on Swift, visionOS, and AI-assisted workflows — building spatial experiences for healthcare, education, collaboration, creative entertainment, relaxation, and well-being.
Outside of work, I'm drawn to sport, faith, psychology, and personal growth — especially where they connect with discipline, meaning, learning, and human potential.
about.beyond: Outside of work, I'm drawn to sport, faith, psychology, and personal growth — and to the deeper question of how technology can help people learn, collaborate, and live more meaningful lives.

areas.title: Spatial Computing & visionOS

areas.title: Apple Platforms

areas.title: AI & Intelligent Applications
areas.description: AI-assisted workflows and intelligent product features designed around real human needs, not hype.

areas.title: Healthcare XR & Telepresence
areas.description: Spatial experiences for medical training, robotic surgery education, remote collaboration and immersive learning.

areas.title: Architecture & Full-Stack Engineering
areas.description: Reliable, maintainable systems — from .NET backends and APIs to JavaScript frontends and complex product domains.

areas.title: Mentoring & Developer Education
areas.description: Workshops, lectures and mentoring for developers who want to grow stronger engineering judgment and practical skills.
